types:type.name: customer-example
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type customer_example = {| firstName: String, lastName: String, email: String |} {"example": "{\\\"firstName\\\":\\\"John\\\",\\\"lastName\\\":\\\"Doe\\\",\\\"email\\\":\\\"john.doe@example.com\\\"}"}

types:type.name: customer_db_output
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type customer_db_output = {| id: Number {"typeId": "int"}, firstName: String, lastName: String, email: String |} {"example": "{\\\"id\\\":1,\\\"firstName\\\":\\\"John\\\",\\\"lastName\\\":\\\"Doe\\\",\\\"email\\\":\\\"john.doe@example.com\\\"}"}
